summary: Tested CineWorld social system: Major (alliances), Friends, Notifications. All 3 pages are accessible and functional. Backend APIs working correctly. Italian translation syncs at login.
passed_tests: GET /api/notifications - Returns list with unread_count
GET /api/notifications/count - Returns unread notification count correctly
GET /api/friends - Returns friends list
GET /api/friends/requests - Returns incoming/outgoing requests
POST /api/friends/request - Send friend request creates notification
POST /api/friends/request/{id}/accept - Accepting creates 'friend_accepted' notification
GET /api/followers - Returns followers list
GET /api/following - Returns following list
POST /api/follow/{user_id} - Follow user creates 'new_follower' notification
DELETE /api/follow/{user_id} - Unfollow user works
GET /api/major/my - Returns has_major=false + can_create for level < 20 users
GET /api/major/challenge - Returns weekly challenge info
POST /api/notifications/read - Mark notifications as read works
Login response includes user language setting
/major page accessible and shows correct state
/friends page accessible with 4 tabs (Amici, Follower, Seguiti, Richieste)
/notifications page accessible and shows notifications
Navbar has Major, Friends, Notifications icons
Notification counter badge shows unread count in navbar
Language syncs at login - UI displays in Italian for user with language=it

major_page.details: /major route accessible. Shows 'Non sei in una Major' message and 'Livello 0/20' badge for users below level 20.

friends_page.details: /friends route accessible. Has 4 tabs: Amici (1), Follower (0), Seguiti (1), Richieste. Shows friends with avatar and production house.

notifications_page.details: /notifications route accessible. Shows list of notifications with type icons, timestamps, delete buttons, and 'Segna tutto letto' button.

friend_request_flow.details: Sending friend request creates notification for recipient. Accepting creates 'friend_accepted' notification for sender. Both users appear in each other's friends list.

notification_generation.details: Notifications auto-generated for: friend_request, friend_accepted, new_follower. Verified via API and UI.

navbar_icons.details: Major (Crown icon), Friends (UserPlus icon), Notifications (Bell icon with red counter badge) all present in navbar.

language_sync.details: User with language='it' sees UI in Italian after login. Navbar shows: I Miei Film, Crea Film, Mini Giochi, Classifica, etc.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 social pages accessible, navbar icons present)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users. Test users already friends from previous test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social system complete and working: /major shows level requirement for users < level 20, /friends has 4 tabs with correct counts, /notifications shows notification list with actions. Friend request and follow flows generate appropriate notifications. Language syncs at login. Test users TSocial2 and TestFriend are already friends.
